Title: xtree_doc
Feature: xtree_doc(document, parser_mode, base_uri, content_encoding, content_language, dtd_validator_config)
Description: returns an entity object created from an XML document

This parses the argument, which is expected to be a well formed XML fragment and returns a
parse tree as a special memory-resident object. While xper_doc creates
some disk-resident data structure, xtree_doc() will work faster but it may require more memory. You may
wish to use xtree_doc for small documents (e.g. less than 5 megabytes and xper_doc for larger documents.
